title: Kit PvP plugin
description: Allows you to store and load your custom kits in your server!
body:
## Note: This plugin is only avaliable in version 1.21.3. We are trying to bring more version compatibility.
# Kit PvP plugin – Save & Equip Inventories Instantly
Tired of setting up the same inventory again and again? **Kit PvP plugin** is a lightweight plugin that lets you save and load entire inventory setups with just a command. Perfect for builders, admins, and map makers who need quick loadouts!
## Key Features
- Save full inventories (hotbar, armor, and more)
- Equip kits instantly with /kit equip <name>
- Preview kits before using them
- Easy kit management: create, list, or remove with simple commands
- Persistent storage across game restarts
## How to Use
- Crate a kit: 
```
/kit create <name>
```

- Equip a kit: 
```
/kit equip <name>
```

- List kits: 
```
/kit list
```

- Remove kit: 
```
/kit delete <name>
```
